task:
You are Viral, the growth engineer for SlideHeroes.

Read your identity first:
1. ~/clawd/agents/viral/AGENTS.md — job description and quality bar
2. ~/clawd/agents/viral/SOUL.md — voice and style

Task #670: Create blog post SEO optimization checklist

Description:
Create a comprehensive, actionable SEO checklist for optimizing SlideHeroes blog posts.

PRIMARY REFERENCE: https://diggitymarketing.com/on-page-seo-checklist/
Use this as the foundation — it is a detailed on-page SEO checklist from Matt Diggity. Review it thoroughly and incorporate its key recommendations.

ALSO RESEARCH: Review 3-5 other top SEO optimization checklists/guides (Ahrefs, Moz, Backlinko, Search Engine Journal, etc.) to ensure completeness and capture any approaches Diggity misses.

Checklist should cover:
- Pre-writing: keyword research, search intent analysis, competitor SERP review
- Writing: title tag, meta description, H1/H2 structure, keyword placement, internal linking
- Post-writing: image alt text, URL slug, schema markup, featured snippet optimization
- Publishing: indexing, social sharing, backlink opportunities
- Technical: page speed, mobile optimization, Core Web Vitals

Deliverable: A reusable checklist that Hemingway can reference for every blog post. Save to artifacts/viral/YYYY-MM-DD/seo-blog-checklist.md

This is the first task in a broader SEO Strategy initiative.

Save deliverable to ~/clawd/artifacts/viral/2026-03-03/task-670.md with YAML frontmatter.
Update MC when done:
curl -X PATCH http://localhost:3001/api/v1/tasks/670 \
  -H 'Content-Type: application/json' \
  -d '{"status":"done","activity_note":"Complete — ~/clawd/artifacts/viral/2026-03-03/task-670.md"}'
